channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: King Charles III and Queen Camilla host diplomatic garden party in Washington during US state visit
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla concluded the first day of their state visit to the United States by hosting a large garden party at the British Embassy in Washington, attended by around 650 guests...

item.title: Rivers Traditional Rulers Pledge Proactive Steps to Stop Gender‑Based Violence
item.description: Traditional rulers in Rivers State have promised to fight more strongly against gender‑based violence (GBV), working with ActionAid and the Rivers State Ministry of Social Welfare and Rehabilitation. ...

item.title: Victoria Police investigate arson attacks on Melbourne hospitality venues
item.description: Victoria Police have set up a specialist taskforce to investigate a series of arson attacks targeting restaurants, bars, and nightclubs across inner Melbourne, including the CBD, South Melbourne, Sout...

item.title: Ahmednasir Outlines Potential Outcomes if Gachagua's Impeachment Is Overturned
item.description: Senior Counsel Ahmednasir Abdullahi has given his legal perspective on the potential consequences if the High Court overturns former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua's impeachment. According to Ahmed...

item.title: Family of influencer Ashlee Jenae raises concerns over missing belongings after body is returned from Zanzibar
item.description: The family of Ashlee Jenae, whose real name was Ashly Robinson, is still searching for answers following her sudden death while on holiday in Zanzibar. The influencer, who had built a following of ove...

item.title: B.C. Delays Approval of Advanced Inflammatory Bowel Disease Drugs, Critics Say
item.description: The Canadian Gastrointestinal Society has criticized the B.C. government for delaying the approval of advanced medications used to treat inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). In a statement, the Society e...

item.title: Google joins US defense contracts allowing AI use in classified Pentagon operations
item.description: Nakipagkasundo ang Google sa US Department of Defense para payagan ang paggamit ng kanilang artificial intelligence models sa mga classified na operasyon ng gobyerno, ayon sa ulat ng The Information. ...

item.title: Britain faces modern hybrid threats requiring resilience and societal cohesion
item.description: Britain is increasingly confronted with hybrid forms of warfare, which include cyber-attacks, disinformation campaigns, and strategic blockades of essential supplies, rather than conventional combat. ...

item.title: Imran Khan undergoes fourth eye treatment as doctors report stable condition
item.description: Former prime minister and PTI founder Imran Khan was administered his fourth intravitreal eye injection at the Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (PIMS) in Islamabad as part of his ongoing medical...

item.title: White-collar unions push for AI job loss regulation as risks increase
item.description: White-collar unions are at odds with the Albanese government ahead of a critical meeting regarding the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on employment. The unions are contesting findings that AI ...

item.title: Senate Allocates P26-M Budget for Possible Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The Philippine Senate has at least P26 million set aside to cover expenses in case an impeachment trial for Vice President Sara Duterte moves forward. Senate President Pro Tempore Panfilo “Ping” Lacso...

item.title: Letters to the Editor Highlight Concerns About Government Investment Funds and Market Opportunities
item.description: The Globe and Mail’s letters to the editor on April 28 address several issues, with a primary focus on concerns regarding government involvement in Canada’s capital markets. One letter questions the n...

item.title: Presidency Highlights Tinubu Administration Projects Across Nigeria
item.description: The Presidency under President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don talk say the government don make plenty remarkable progress for transforming Nigeria. According to Special Adviser on Information and Strategy, Bay...

item.title: King Charles visits US to strengthen UK-US relations amid Iran tensions
item.description: Britain’s King Charles III arrived in the United States on a four-day state visit, meeting former President Donald Trump at the White House amid growing tensions over the US-led war in Iran. Despite a...

item.title: Kevin Anderson launches fundraiser after cousin dies following violent home attack
item.description: Former South African tennis star Kevin Anderson has shared the tragic news that his cousin, Bruce Franck, has died after a violent attack at his home in South Africa earlier this month. The incident t...

item.title: Texas School Bible Reading Proposal Raises Constitutional Questions on Religion in Public Education
item.description: Texas education officials are considering a proposal to include selected Bible passages in required reading lists for K–12 students, reviving longstanding constitutional debates over religion in publi...

item.title: OpenAI Gains Flexibility as Microsoft Renegotiates Partnership
item.description: Ang Microsoft at OpenAI, dalawang nangungunang kumpanya sa larangan ng artificial intelligence, ay nagkaron ng malaking pagbabago sa kanilang kasunduan. Pinapayagan na ngayon ng bagong terms ang OpenA...

item.title: Rethinking Africa’s Education for AI and a Growing Workforce
item.description: Education in Africa is at a crossroads. The traditional path where a diploma led to a degree, a degree to a job, and a job to stability is no longer guaranteed. Many graduates are now finding themselv...

item.title: Major Incidents Across Africa: South Sudan Plane Crash, Nigeria Attack, Chad Clashes, and Sudan Drone Strikes
item.description: This news roundup highlights several serious incidents across different parts of Africa. In South Sudan, a Cessna 208 Caravan aircraft crashed about 20 kilometres from Juba shortly after losing contac...

item.title: Manish Sisodia Refuses to Appear Before Delhi HC in Liquor Policy Case Citing Concerns Over Judicial Impartiality
item.description: Manish Sisodia, senior leader of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), on Tuesday declared that he will abstain from personally appearing, or sending a lawyer, before Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma of the Delhi Hi...
